signals.headline: Ethereum Price Surge Amid Geopolitical Tensions | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Price Surge Amid Geopolitical Tensions | YES | HIGH confidence**

As of April 17, Ethereum surged **14% over the past week**, pushing prediction market odds to **56% YES** on Polymarket for ETH reaching $4,000 by April 30[2]. The surge was partially attributed to geopolitical tensions involving Trump's ultimatum to Iran, with subsequent de-escalation signals providing recovery room[2]. Tr

signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% YoY in March 2026 (from 2.0% in February), undershooting market consensus of 2.3-2.4% due to government fuel caps despite oil price surges.**[1][2][3] | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence

This March CPI data—released around April 2, 2026—marks the latest confirmed figure, driven by transportation costs up 5% YoY from oil shocks (tied to Middle East tensions)
